title: helianthemum cinereum var. rossmaessleri
intro: Helianthemum cinereum var. rossmaessleri, also known as Dusky Rockrose, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to the mountains of Europe. The plant is often used in herbal medicine due to its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Helianthemum cinereum var. rossmaessleri include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
